prompt:
Goal: Create a premium vertical opening-hoarding poster for a fragrance lifestyle pop-up store, with an elegant beige-gray Zen aesthetic, 3D folded wall installation, product still life photography, and Chinese promotional typography.

Canvas: Vertical poster, 9:16 ratio, soft warm ivory background with subtle plaster texture, mist, pale shadows of branches, refined luxury retail atmosphere.

Brand header: At the top center place a minimal rounded-square monogram logo with an S line mark, then the brand name Maison Serein and the small Chinese subtitle 静息香氛. Below it, add spaced serif text “POP-UP STORE” with thin decorative horizontal lines on both sides.

Main headline: Large expressive Chinese calligraphy headline centered: 闻香打卡·限时开启. Under it, create a pill-shaped benefit badge: dark taupe rounded capsule on the left with a huge white “300”, connected to a light outlined rounded rectangle reading “份香氛卡免费领”.

Central 3D hoarding installation: Build one continuous freestanding display wall made of exactly 3 angled panels forming a shallow zigzag booth, photographed from the front with realistic perspective and soft shadows.
1. Left panel: smoky marble-like fragrance image background, large vertical Chinese text in 5 stacked lines: 香氛 / 生活方式 / 居家美学 / 身体护理. In front of it place a clear glass reed diffuser bottle with black cap and exactly 4 black reeds, plus one small gray stone beside it. Add tiny English category text near the bottom: “FRAGRANCE / LIFESTYLE / HOME & BODY”.
2. Center panel: clean beige wall with brand logo at top. Attach a torn handmade paper notice with two beige tape strips. The paper headline reads “300份 香氛卡免费领”, followed by smaller Chinese copy: “闻香打卡即领” and “活动时间：开业首周 每天限量，先到先得”. Near the bottom add handwritten English script: “Quiet Scents / Gentle Living” and a small curved phrase “SCENT YOUR LIFE”.
3. Right panel: soft branch-shadow background. Place a small lit white candle on a stone pedestal and a small perfume bottle on a rough concrete block. Add a narrow vertical text card reading “随手一拍 就出片 到店还可 送香礼”.

Bottom information area: Center a location pin icon followed by “MAISON SEREIN 静息香氛 CCMALL 店”. Beneath it write “在城市中央，留住片刻安静”. Then create exactly 3 bottom information blocks separated by thin vertical lines: left block “2026” with “开业时间” below, center block “CITY MALL ATRIUM” with “L1层” below, right block a square QR code with “扫码了解更多” below.

Footer strip: Add a dark taupe horizontal bar at the very bottom with widely spaced white uppercase text: QUIET SCENTS GENTLE LIVING.

Visual style: High-end minimalist fragrance brand, muted taupe, warm beige, smoky gray, off-white, natural stone texture, frosted glass, paper fibers, soft shadows, elegant serif Latin typography, large Chinese brush calligraphy, realistic 3D product mockup, calm aspirational retail marketing. Keep the layout symmetrical, spacious, and premium; no people, no clutter, no extra icons beyond the location pin and QR code.
